creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 256996
port patch rev 4

- remove cairo and gdkpixbuf2 from USE_GNOME as they are implied by gtk30
- remove post-patch that removed gdkwayland. It seems like wayland is not something to fear these days
- xreader uses gdbus which is part of glib. Set DBUS_RUN_DEPENDS instead of DBUS_LIB_DEPENDS
